scope.dependency_radius: Sub-agent manifests and existing human-facing sub-agent taxonomy guide only.
constraints: human_guide must either point to a human-facing .dev/guides path or be replaced by a correctly named agent-facing field.
Do not alter implementation playbook references unless they are incorrect.
non_goals: Do not rewrite sub-agent implementation rules.
Do not create new sub-agent roles.

review_findings: 17 sub-agent manifests use human_guide: .ai/SUB-AGENT-SYSTEM.MD even though the target is agent-facing.

steps: Choose a single target guide or field rename policy.
Validate all referenced guide paths exist.
validation: PowerShell referenced-path existence scan for changed sub-agent manifests
